grandline.question: What are the management fee terms?
What is the performance fee or carried interest rate?
Is there a hurdle rate, and if so what is it?
Is there a high-water mark provision?
What is the redemption notice period?
Is there a lock-up period? How long?
What gating provisions exist on redemptions?
Is there a redemption gate threshold?
Are there any side letters affecting our share class?
Do we have an MFN (most-favored-nation) clause?
What capacity rights or co-investment rights do we have?
Is there a fee break or fee rebate?
Who is the portfolio manager?
What is the firm's AUM?
What was the strategy's max drawdown to date?
What was the 2024 net return?
Who is the fund administrator?
Who is the auditor?
What is the fund's domicile / jurisdiction?
What is the GP commitment to the fund?
Is there a key-person clause? Who is named?
What share classes are offered, and what are their differences?
What is the strategy's investment approach in one paragraph?
What custodians or prime brokers does the fund use?
